ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.instanceIds: List of specified instance IDs, up to 100
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.imageId: The ID of the image to be used
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.adminPass: Instance password (must be encrypted for transmission, see Password Encryption Specification); either adminPass or keypairId is required
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.keypairId: ID of the key pair to bind to the reinstalled instance; either adminPass or keypairId is required
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.cleanLastUserData: Whether to clear the current custom scripts (including GPU drivers and CFS file systems); default is false
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.userData: Custom script for reinstallation; if not specified, the current custom scripts (including GPU drivers and CFS file systems) are used
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.keepImageLogin: Whether to use the preset password in the image; default is false. true: use the preset password in the image; false: do not use it. 1. If set to true, password and keypairId must be empty. 2. Only supported for custom images or shared images.
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.isOpenHostEye: Whether to enable host security; default is true
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.sysRootSize: System disk size; only applies to EBC instances
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.isPreserveData: Whether to preserve data during reinstallation; only applies to local disks of EBC instances. When set to true, raidId and sysRootSize fields are ignored
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.raidId: RAID configuration ID; only applies to EBC instances. Required when isPreserveData is false; ignored when isPreserveData is true
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.dataPartitionType: Data disk partition format; only applies to EBC instances
ReinstallInstancesBatchReinstallation.rootPartitionType: System disk partition format; only applies to EBC instances
